spec_match.rationale: Highly compliant. Evaluates both standard length limits and percentage-based constraints (fit-content(25%)) which is a key capability of the spec.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding interactive options. Has tab selectors, direct numeric numeric inputs for caps, and a live user-editable tag-editor queue.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses extreme text lengths, dynamic flex wrap, and percentage scaling constraints gracefully.

design_system.rationale: Clean design. Utilizes paper/stone layouts and black/ivory active buttons beautifully.

summary: An exceptional interactive tag builder showcasing real-world fit-content usage (including percentage caps) complete with live tag cloud updates and CSS code blocks.
